VAL-GS1-GAP1.evidence: Created product with 13-digit GTIN '0012345678905', minted it to ACTIVE status. Resolver GET /01/0012345678905/21/GAP1-001 (13-digit) returned HTTP 200 with JSON-LD containing 14-digit padded GTIN '00012345678905' in @id, gs1:gtin, and galileo:digitalLink fields. Resolver GET /01/00012345678905/21/GAP1-001 (14-digit) also returned HTTP 200 with identical JSON-LD response. Both padded and unpadded GTINs resolve correctly; the response always contains the 14-digit form.
steps: Login as testuser2@galileo.test with X-Galileo-Client header → 200, cookie jar saved

POST /products with name 'GAP1-Test', serialNumber 'GAP1-001', gtin '0012345678905', category 'Leather Goods' → 201, product ID cmmbswcos0004wl14998eskiz, DID already shows 14-digit padded GTIN in digitalLink and did fields
POST /products/cmmbswcos0004wl14998eskiz/mint with X-Galileo-Client header → 200, status changed to ACTIVE

GET /01/0012345678905/21/GAP1-001 (13-digit GTIN) → 200, JSON-LD with @id='did:galileo:01:00012345678905:21:GAP1-001', gs1:gtin='00012345678905', galileo:digitalLink='https://id.galileoprotocol.io/01/00012345678905/21/GAP1-001', galileo:status='verified'
GET /01/00012345678905/21/GAP1-001 (14-digit padded GTIN) → 200, identical JSON-LD response with all fields showing 14-digit padded GTIN
